creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port tells you how to do it when you start building it:


 mplayerplug-in is using firefox for gecko support, but you can
 change that by defining WITH_GECKO to the following values:

   firefox 
   mozilla 
   seamonkey 


-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Is this a dagger which I see before me, its handle towards my hand?
Come, let me clutch thee! I have thee not, and yet I see thee still.
